spl_product_data_elements: NATUHEAL RELIEF Cream FOR ECZEMA Hydrocortisone acetate 1% RELIEF Cream FOR ECZEMA HYDROCORTISONE ACETATE HYDROCORTISONE MAGNESIUM ASCORBYL PHOSPHATE BORNEOL MALTODEXTRIN BISABOLOL GLYCERIN MENTHOL CETYL ALCOHOL OAT GLYCERYL 1-STEARATE ISOHEXADECANE
indications_and_usage: Use ■temporarily relieves itching and discomfort associated with minor skin irritations.rashes, and inflammation, and due to eczema.■other uses of this product should only be under the advice and supervision of a doctor
do_not_use: Do not use ■for the treatment of diaper rash. Consult a doctor.
when_using: When Using ■avoid contact with eyes ■do not use more than directed unless told to do so by a doctor
stop_use: Stop Use ■condition worsens, symptoms persist for more than 7 days or clear up and occur again within a few days, and do not begin use of any other hydrocortisone product unless you have asked a doctor
ask_doctor: Ask Doctor ■condition worsens, symptoms persist for more than 7 days or clear up and occur again within a few days, and do not begin use of any other hydrocortisone product unless you have asked a doctor
keep_out_of_reach_of_children: Keep Oot Of Reach Of Children If swallowed, get medical help or contact a Poison Control Center right away
dosage_and_administration: Directions ■adults and children 2 years of age and older: apply to affected area not more than 3 to 4 times daily ■children under 2 years of age: ask a doctor
storage_and_handling: Other information ■contents filled by weight. not volume ■Store at 20°to 25°C(68°to 77°F) ■Protect from excessive heat and direct sunlight
inactive_ingredient: Inactive ingredients Cetyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Avena sativa (oat) kernel extract, Bisabolol, Glyceryl stearate,lsohexadecane,Magnesium ascorbyl phosphate. Maltodextrin.Borneol. Menthol

generic_name: HYDROCORTISONE ACETATE 1% RELIEF CREAM FOR ECZEMA
